productName: hashbreak - - Infused Pre Rolls - Candy Apple - 3.5g
description: This infused hybrid pre-roll wraps Candy Apple flower around a concentrate boost (think kief, hash, distillate, or diamonds) for a louder aroma and a longer session. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — with notes of apple, pineapple, and blueberry, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
